title: AI Trust & Safety Digest
tagline: A curated current snapshot of AI trust, safety, and governance, including as many materially important fresh items as the day warrants.
lead: The strongest signal today is governance: OpenAI published a more concrete frontier-AI policy package spanning federal oversight, political advocacy, and youth protections. These items matter less as product news than as primary-source evidence of how a major frontier lab wants safety, standards, and public accountability to be structured.

items.title: OpenAI proposes federal blueprint for frontier AI governance
items.why_it_matters: It signals how a frontier lab wants safety, resilience, and national-security oversight formalized.

items.title: OpenAI publishes broader AI public policy agenda
items.why_it_matters: It frames the company’s positions on safety, standards, youth protection, and workforce governance.

items.title: OpenAI calls for global action on youth AI safety
items.why_it_matters: It pushes for international safeguards and standards around minors’ exposure to AI systems.

items.title: OpenAI outlines its stance on AI policy and political advocacy
items.why_it_matters: It clarifies the company’s regulatory posture and who is authorized to speak for it.

note: Selected from recent trust-and-safety relevant posts and papers by labs, evaluators, standards bodies, policy organizations, and arXiv, then summarized with GPT-5.4. Includes as many materially important fresh items as the day warrants.
